productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Madbury Convertible Off White Pant
description: CompositionOff white convertible pants in a mix of 73% cotton and 27% nylon, with a zip fly, two cargo pockets, two front zip pockets and one rear double-welted zip pocket offer plenty of secure storage, legs zip off at knee to convert into shortsFittingSlimWash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry normal at low heat Warm iron when needed Dry cleanable Crafted from a cotton and nylon blend for strength and breathability, these rugged canvas pants are perfect for the outdoorsman, as they're really two pairs in one. When the temperature rises and you're working hard to get to the summit or clear brush from the yard, the pant legs zip off completely at the knee to convert into shorts. Versatile clothing is essential when you're spending time outside, and these durable performance pants should definitely have a place of honour in your pack when you're preparing for your next backcountry adventure, fishing trip or afternoon at the park. Regular Fit isn't too tight, and we've treated the fabric with a water- and UV-resistant finish to offer an extra layer of protection from the elements.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 40 ftHeight-6 ft, waist-32"
